title: Analytics - Device Release Notes Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when viewing device-specific release notes in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll down and tap on 'Release Notes' (or 'Firmware Release Notes') for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
View the device-specific release notes content on the screen.
expected: The app logs an analytics event when device-specific release notes are viewed. The event includes default analytics elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment. Event counts update after a few hours.
